---
title: "Conclusion"
---

A short closing chapter (5–10 pages typical) restating the research question,
summarizing the contribution, and offering a final reflection on the
significance of the work.

## Restating the research question

Briefly remind the reader of the central question this dissertation answered.

## Summary of contribution

In two or three paragraphs, recap your contribution as the reader has now
seen it argued + supported across the dissertation.

## Closing reflection

What did you learn in the process of doing this work? What surprised you?
Where do you see your scholarly project going next?
